pages.title: Mana Reservoir Ring
pages.text: $(thing)Mana Reservoir Ring$() — Petal Apothecary. +100 Max Mana. Passively converts Botania mana to ISS mana when ISS reserves drop below 50%. Doubles as a 200,000-unit Botania mana store via the network capability.

pages.title: Daybloom Amulet
pages.text: $(thing)Daybloom Amulet$() — Petal Apothecary, with Daybloom flowers and gold. Grants +15% Nature Spell Power and +5% Cast Speed only while in direct sunlight. Bonuses fade indoors or after dusk.

pages.title: Gaia's Blessing
pages.text: $(thing)Gaia's Blessing$() — Terra Plate, requires Gaia Spirit + a Daybloom Amulet. While worn, every Botany-school spell cast gains $(o)+1 effective level$(), paid for by draining 100,000 mana from a Mana Pool within 16 blocks. If no pool can pay, the bonus fizzles silently for that cast.
